Container.Name: MediaHelm
Container.Overview: MediaHelm — a Plex/Jellyfin/Emby admin & diagnostics companion with a built-in IPTV stream manager that appears as an HDHomeRun tuner. Live streams dashboard, "why won't this play?" diagnostics, metadata rollback (Plex), issue portal + Kanban, M3U/EPG import, shared-upstream proxy, and notifications.
Container.Description: Self-hosted control plane for Plex, Jellyfin and Emby — plus an IPTV-to-LiveTV proxy. A secret is generated on first run; persist /data to keep it. For HDHomeRun auto-discovery, switch Network Type to Host.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the MediaHelm web UI

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent data: database, metadata snapshots, generated secret

Config.Name: Advertised URL
Config.Description: External base URL advertised to media servers for HDHomeRun discovery (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:5005). Leave blank to auto-detect.

Config.Name: Tuner Count
Config.Description: Max distinct IPTV channels streamed at once

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set true if serving over HTTPS (marks cookies Secure)
